summary: Current value 3.19% as of Feb 12. 8 trading days to resolution. MC simulation median ~3.18, std ~0.17. Recent widening from 2.81 to 3.19 driven by tariff concerns.
content: Series BAMLH0A2HYB - ICE BofA Single-B US High Yield OAS. Last value 3.19% on Feb 12 2026. Resolution on Feb 25 2026 (8 trading days). Daily change std ~0.055, 8-day std ~0.185. Monte Carlo simulations (bootstrap, parametric, historical 8-day diffs) all converge: P10=2.99, P20=3.06, P40=3.15, P60=3.22, P80=3.32, P90=3.40. News context: tariff concerns driving spread widening since late Jan, but general view is spreads should remain contained. No imminent catalyst for major move in either direction over the next 8 trading days.
